# Radio-group

Styled radio group component built on zw-radio-group primitives.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/radio-group</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/radio-group
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from '@zeus-web/radio-group/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/radio-group/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop           | Type                                                          | Default    | Description                  |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------- | ---------------------------- |
| `value`        | `string`                                                      | -          | Controlled selected value.   |
| `defaultValue` | `string`                                                      | -          | Initial selected value.      |
| `name`         | `string`                                                      | -          | Native radio group name.     |
| `orientation`  | `RadioGroupOrientation`<br />Values: `horizontal`, `vertical` | `vertical` | Layout orientation.          |
| `required`     | `boolean`                                                     | -          | Marks the group as required. |

## Events

| Event          | React prop      | Detail                              | Description                          |
| -------------- | --------------- | ----------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| `value-change` | `onValueChange` | `value: string, nativeEvent: Event` | Emitted when selected value changes. |

## Slots

| Slot      | Description              |
| --------- | ------------------------ |
| `default` | RadioGroupItem children. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `text-primary`
- `ring-ring`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=radio-group-control]`
- `[data-slot=radio-group-label]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `radio-group` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/radio-group`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add radio-group`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use RadioGroup for one-of-many choices.
- Keep RadioGroupItem values unique.

Do not:

- Do not use Checkbox when only one option can be selected.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from '@/components/ui/radio-group'

export function Example() {
  return (
    <RadioGroup defaultValue="email">
      <RadioGroupItem value="email">Email</RadioGroupItem>
      <RadioGroupItem value="sms">SMS</RadioGroupItem>
    </RadioGroup>
  )
}
```
